name: Sdi Limited
analysis: SDI has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.3620. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$1.3620, stop A$1.3316, target A$1.3850. Risk/reward is 0.76:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
